overview: A full-stack Fake Review Detection System that uses NLP and heuristic ML to classify product reviews as Real or Fake. Features include single review analysis, CSV bulk upload, a full history log, Recharts analytics, and an Internet Identity login system.
features: Login with Internet Identity and test accounts
Submit a product review and get Real/Fake verdict with confidence score
Bulk analyze reviews by uploading a CSV file
View full review history with filtering, sorting, and delete
Analytics dashboard with Recharts pie and bar charts
Home, About, and Contact pages with responsive design
NLP heuristic classifier with TF-IDF scoring and suspicious word highlighting
